Products.Name: Kanzi Apple
Products.SupplyLimitMessage: 'Kanzi Apple' has a supply limit of 36. The quantity in your cart has been reduced accordingly. To purchase a larger quantity, please contact us on 1800 000 610. Please note we do not supply trade orders.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Planning a healthy snack? Reach for Kanzi Apple. Its sweet and tangy taste makes it a delicious and convenient choice for any day of the week. Shop now at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Kanzi apples have a delicious sweet and tangy taste, with their flavour coming from the variety’s parents - the sweet Gala and the tangy Braeburn.  

How to Pick:
Apples should be bright and crunchy, with a tight skin and juicy flesh. Our apples have a natural shine and no added wax.

How to Store:
Storing your apples in the fridge will keep them crisp and fresh for longer.
Consume apples within 2 weeks for the best eating experience.

Where it's Grown:
Our hand picked apples are 100% Australian grown. Our expert growers pick them from trees in the colder climate regions of Australia to ensure they have the best flavour, colour and firmness.

Health Benefits:
No matter the variety, apples contain fibre, that aids in healthy digestion, and vitamin C, to support the immune system*

*Based on one medium apple (150g), as part of a healthy balanced diet

Products.Name: Iceberg Lettuce
Products.SupplyLimitMessage: 'Iceberg Lettuce' has a supply limit of 36. The quantity in your cart has been reduced accordingly. To purchase a larger quantity, please contact us on 1800 000 610. Please note we do not supply trade orders.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Planning a fresh meal? Reach for Iceberg Lettuce. Its crunchy leaves and mild flavour make it a versatile choice. Available at Woolworths online.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>Iceberg Lettuce offers crisp, crunchy leaves with a refreshing, mild flavour. Its outer leaves are a darker green, transitioning to pale green at the centre, making it a versatile choice for many dishes. Enjoy its satisfying texture in salads, sandwiches, and as a creative wrap.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Choose an iceberg lettuce with a firm, compact head and fresh-looking, vibrant leaves. Avoid any with brown edges, wilting, or soft spots, which indicate it is past its prime.
</section>

<section><header>How to Store:</header> To maintain freshness, store your iceberg lettuce unwashed in the crisper drawer of your refrigerator. Place it in a loosely sealed plastic bag or container to help retain its crispness.</section>

Products.Name: Woolworths Cherry Tomatoes Punnet
Products.SupplyLimitMessage: 'Woolworths Cherry Tomatoes Punnet' has a supply limit of 36. The quantity in your cart has been reduced accordingly. To purchase a larger quantity, please contact us on 1800 000 610. Please note we do not supply trade orders.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Enjoy the vibrant taste of Woolworths Cherry Tomatoes, Australian grown and deliciously fresh for salads, snacks, & more. Shop now at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>Woolworths Cherry Tomatoes are vibrant, bite-sized gems with a naturally sweet and juicy flavour. These small, round tomatoes are perfect for adding a burst of freshness to any meal or enjoying as a simple snack. They bring a delightful pop of colour and taste to your culinary creations.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Choose cherry tomatoes that are firm and have a smooth, unblemished skin. Look for a vibrant red colour, indicating ripeness and flavour.
</section>

<section><header>Ways to Eat:</header> Enjoy these cherry tomatoes raw in fresh salads, as a healthy snack, or threaded onto skewers. They are also delicious roasted, added to pasta dishes, or used to top pizzas and bruschetta. Their sweet flavour enhances many recipes.
</section>

<section><header>How to Store:</header> Store cherry tomatoes at room temperature, away from direct sunlight, to maintain their best flavour and texture. Wash them thoroughly before use.
</section>

<section><header>Cooking Methods:</header> Bake, grill, roast, sauté.
</section>

<section><header>Where it's Grown:</header> Grown in Australia.</section>

Products.Name: Apple Royal Gala
Products.SupplyLimitMessage: 'Apple Royal Gala' has a supply limit of 36. The quantity in your cart has been reduced accordingly. To purchase a larger quantity, please contact us on 1800 000 610. Please note we do not supply trade orders.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Discover Fresh Fruit Apples Royal Gala. A natural product with fresh Royal Gala apples, it's ideal for a wholesome snack. Available at Woolworths online.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>Fresh Fruit Apples Royal Gala offer a delightful sweet, crisp flavour. These firm apples, with vibrant red and yellow striped skin, are ideal for snacking or culinary creations.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Select Royal Gala apples that are firm and have a vibrant red and yellow colour. Avoid soft spots, bruises, or visible blemishes.

</section>

<section><header>Ways to Eat:</header> Enjoy fresh as a snack, sliced in salads, or with cheese. Excellent baked in pies, crumbles, or simmered into apple sauce.

</section>

<section><header>How to Store:</header> Store Royal Gala apples in your refrigerator's crisper drawer to maintain freshness. They remain crisp and fresh for several weeks.

</section>

<section><header>Cooking Methods:</header> Bake, stew, sauté, microwave, roast, grill.

</section>

<section><header>Where it's Grown:</header> These Royal Gala apples are proudly grown in Australia, ensuring quality from local orchards.</section>

Products.Name: Blueberries Punnet
Products.SupplyLimitMessage: 'Blueberries Punnet' has a supply limit of 36. The quantity in your cart has been reduced accordingly. To purchase a larger quantity, please contact us on 1800 000 610. Please note we do not supply trade orders.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Need a versatile fruit? Fresh Fruit Blueberries are a juicy and tasty solution for eating on the go or baking. Add it to your cart at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>Fresh Fruit Blueberries offer a juicy, tasty burst of natural sweetness. These versatile berries are perfect for enjoying on their own, adding to meals, or using in your favourite baking recipes.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Select plump, firm blueberries with a uniform deep blue-purple colour and a light, silvery bloom. Avoid any berries that appear soft, shrivelled, or discoloured.

</section>

<section><header>Ways to Eat:</header> Enjoy fresh blueberries as a convenient snack or sprinkle them over cereals, yoghurt, and pancakes. Blend into smoothies, or add to muffins, tarts, and other baked goods for a delicious touch.

</section>

<section><header>How to Store:</header> To keep blueberries fresh, rinse and gently dry them before storing. Place in an unsealed container and refrigerate. This method helps maintain their quality and extends their shelf life.

</section>

<section><header>Cooking Methods:</header> Bake, simmer.

</section>

Products.Name: Woolworths Onion Brown Bag
Products.SupplyLimitMessage: 'Woolworths Onion Brown Bag' has a supply limit of 36. The quantity in your cart has been reduced accordingly. To purchase a larger quantity, please contact us on 1800 000 610. Please note we do not supply trade orders.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Woolworths Onion Brown is your versatile choice for everyday meals. Australian grown, it's simple to prepare and enjoy. Available at Woolworths online.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>Woolworths Onion Brown Bag 1kg provides versatile brown onions, a kitchen staple. Their crisp white flesh has a pungent aroma that sweetens when cooked. They add depth and flavour to many savoury dishes.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Choose firm brown onions with dry, papery outer skin. Avoid soft spots, mould, or sprouts.
</section>

<section><header>How to Store:</header> Store in a cool, dry, dark place with good air circulation. Keep separate from potatoes to prevent spoilage.
</section>

<section><header>Ways to Eat:</header> Brown onions are essential for savoury meals. Use as a flavour base for soups, stews, and curries. Caramelise for burgers, roast, or sauté for stir-fries.
</section>

<section><header>Cooking Methods:</header> Bake, boil, braise, caramelise, roast, sauté, stew, stir-fry.</section>
AdditionalAttributes.nutritionalinformation: {"Name":"Nutritional Information","Attributes":[{"Id":908,"Name":"Sugars Quantity Per 100g - SuffixUnits - NIP","Value":"g","Description":"Sugars Quantity Per 100g - SuffixUnits - NIP","SortOrder":646}]}

Products.Name: Woolworths Washed Potatoes Bag
Products.SupplyLimitMessage: 'Woolworths Washed Potatoes Bag' has a supply limit of 36. The quantity in your cart has been reduced accordingly. To purchase a larger quantity, please contact us on 1800 000 610. Please note we do not supply trade orders.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Woolworths Washed Potatoes are your convenient choice for any meal. They're washed for you, making them simple to prepare and enjoy. Shop now at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>Woolworths Washed White Potatoes are a versatile Australian-grown staple. They offer a mild, earthy flavour and smooth texture, ideal for many comforting meals.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Choose firm potatoes with smooth, unblemished skin. Avoid any with green patches, sprouts, or soft spots.
</section>

<section><header>Ways to Eat:</header> These versatile potatoes are delicious mashed, roasted, boiled, or fried. Use them in hearty stews, casseroles, or salads, and they are great for homemade chips or wedges.
</section>

<section><header>How to Store:</header> Store in a cool, dark, well-ventilated place. Avoid refrigeration, as it can impact texture and flavour.
</section>

<section><header>Cooking Methods:</header> Bake, boil, fry, mash, roast, steam.
</section>

<section><header>Where it's Grown:</header> These potatoes are 100% Australian grown and generally available throughout the year.</section>

Products.Name: White Seedless Grapes Bag Approx. 900g
Products.DisplayName: White Seedless Grapes Bag Approx. 900g each
Products.SupplyLimitMessage: 'White Seedless Grapes Bag Approx. 900g' has a supply limit of 36. The quantity in your cart has been reduced accordingly. To purchase a larger quantity, please contact us on 1800 000 610. Please note we do not supply trade orders.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: White Seedless Grapes are your delicious choice for a refreshing snack. They're seedless, making them simple to prepare and enjoy. Shop now at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>White Seedless Grapes offer a delightful, refreshing sweetness and a crisp, plump texture. These versatile grapes are perfect for easy snacking, fruit salads, or enhancing a cheese platter.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Choose grapes that are firm, plump, and vibrantly coloured. Ensure they are securely attached to their stems, free from soft spots or shrivelled skins.
</section>

<section><header>Ways to Eat:</header> Enjoy these seedless grapes fresh as a convenient snack, add to fruit salads, or pair with cheeses. They are also delicious frozen for a cool treat.
</section>

<section><header>How to Store:</header> Store unwashed grapes in your refrigerator's crisper drawer. Keep them in their original packaging or a breathable bag to maintain freshness.
</section>

<section><header>Cooking Methods:</header> Serve fresh, chill, freeze, roast.</section>

Products.Name: Fresh Packham Pear
Products.SupplyLimitMessage: 'Fresh Packham Pear' has a supply limit of 36. The quantity in your cart has been reduced accordingly. To purchase a larger quantity, please contact us on 1800 000 610. Please note we do not supply trade orders.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Discover Fresh Packham Pear. A delicious fruit with a juicy, sweet flavour, it's ideal for a quick snack. Order online from Woolworths today.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>Fresh Packham Pears offer a delightful sweet and juicy flavour with a crisp texture when ripe. These versatile pears are perfect for fresh snacking or adding to various dishes. Their green skin ripens to a soft yellow, indicating readiness.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Choose firm pears that yield slightly to gentle pressure near the stem. Look for smooth, unblemished skin with a consistent green or yellowish hue. Avoid soft spots or damage.
</section>

<section><header>Ways to Eat:</header> Enjoy Packham Pears raw as a refreshing snack, in salads, or on cheese platters. They are delicious baked, poached, or roasted, adding natural sweetness to sweet and savoury meals.
</section>

<section><header>How to Store:</header> Store unripe Packham Pears at room temperature until softened. Once ripe, refrigerate for several days. Keep separate from strong-smelling produce.
</section>

<section><header>Cooking Methods:</header> Bake, poach, roast, grill.</section>

Products.Name: Woolworths Garlic Head
Products.SupplyLimitMessage: 'Woolworths Garlic Head' has a supply limit of 36. The quantity in your cart has been reduced accordingly. To purchase a larger quantity, please contact us on 1800 000 610. Please note we do not supply trade orders.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Garlic Head is your versatile choice for adding flavour to meals. It's an aromatic ingredient, making it simple to enhance any dish. Shop now at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>Garlic Heads offer a distinctive, aromatic flavour, a cornerstone of many global cuisines. Each head provides numerous cloves, ready to add depth to savoury dishes. This versatile ingredient enhances meals with its unique taste.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Select firm, plump garlic heads with dry, papery outer skins. Avoid any soft spots, sprouts, or visible mould.
</section>

<section><header>Ways to Eat:</header> Garlic enhances stir-fries, pasta sauces, roasted vegetables, and marinades. It adds robust flavour to soups, stews, and salad dressings. Perfect for flavouring meats and poultry.
</section>

<section><header>How to Store:</header> Store garlic heads in a cool, dry, dark place with good air circulation. A mesh bag or open basket is ideal.
</section>

<section><header>Cooking Methods:</header> Roast, sauté, mince raw, infuse, fry, braise, grill.</section>

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Discover Woolworths Baby Leaf Spinach. Australian grown and ready to eat, it's a fresh choice for quick meals. Order online from Woolworths today.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>Woolworths Baby Leaf Spinach brings tender, vibrant green leaves that are washed and ready to eat. These versatile leaves offer a mild, fresh flavour and are a source of fibre, perfect for adding to your favourite dishes.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Choose packs with fresh, crisp green leaves and no signs of wilting or yellowing. Ensure the package is free from excess moisture.
</section>

<section><header>How to Store:</header> Store in the refrigerator between 1-5°C to maintain freshness. Once opened, consume within 1-2 days. Spinach can also be frozen for later use.
</section>

<section><header>Where it's Grown:</header> Grown with care in Australia, ensuring fresh, quality produce for your table.</section>

AdditionalAttributes.storageinstructions: Wash before use. To enjoy them at their best, tomatoes should be stored at room temperature.
AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Want good quality produce? Woolworths Sweet Solanato Tomato is a delicious, sweet choice for your kitchen. Order online from Woolworths today.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Bright red Sweet Solanato tomatoes are the size and shape of a grape and have been specially developed to combine acidity with a sweet flavour resulting in a robust tomato burst and a sweet aftertaste.

What to look for
Choose smooth, firm and plump tomatoes with an even colour and no blemishes. For best flavour make sure the fruits are fully red.

Availability
All year.

Store
Tomatoes should be stored at room temperature out of direct sunlight. It will keep the full flavour of the tomatoes. Refrigerate only if they are over ripe.

Ways to eat
Tomatoes are very versatile, they can be eaten raw as snacks, in salads and sandwiches. They can be used in soups, pizzas, omelettes, braises and stews. Tomatoes preserve well and are easily frozen and bottled, made into homemade sauces, chutneys, and dried or sundried. Tomatoes are complemented by many herbs, especially basil.

Cooking Methods
Boil, braise, barbecue/char grill, microwave, slow roast, stir fry.

Products.Name: Corn Sweet
Products.SupplyLimitMessage: 'Corn Sweet' has a supply limit of 36. The quantity in your cart has been reduced accordingly. To purchase a larger quantity, please contact us on 1800 000 610. Please note we do not supply trade orders.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Discover Fresh Vegetable Sweet Corn. A versatile product with sweet kernels, it's ideal for any meal. Order online from Woolworths today.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>Fresh Vegetable Sweet Corn delivers vibrant, juicy kernels with a naturally sweet flavour. This versatile vegetable adds delight to meals, simply or as part of a dish. Its crisp texture and bright taste make it a family favourite.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Choose firm, plump cobs with bright green husks. Look for moist, brownish silks, avoiding dry or black ones. Gently feel for well-developed kernels.
</section>

<section><header>Ways to Eat:</header> Enjoy sweet corn off the cob after cooking, or remove kernels for salads, salsas, and stir-fries. It pairs well with grilled meats and fresh vegetables. Add to soups.
</section>

<section><header>How to Store:</header> Store fresh sweet corn in its husk in the refrigerator. For best flavour, consume within a few days. Keep it cool and moist for quality.
</section>

<section><header>Cooking Methods:</header> Boil, grill, microwave, roast, steam.

</section>

Products.Name: Ginger Fresh
Products.SupplyLimitMessage: 'Ginger Fresh' has a supply limit of 6.324 kg. The quantity in your cart has been reduced accordingly. To purchase a larger quantity, please contact us on 1800 000 610. Please note we do not supply trade orders.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Discover Ginger Fresh. A flavourful product with a pungent spicy aroma, it's ideal for stir fries and marinades. Shop now at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>Ginger Fresh is a versatile root known for its pungent, spicy aroma and distinctive taste. It is a key flavouring in many Asian cuisines, adding a unique warmth to dishes.</section>

<section><header>Ways to Eat:</header> Use Ginger Fresh to infuse flavour into a variety of dishes. It is perfect for stir-fries, fresh salads, warming soups, and savoury marinades. For optimal flavour, add ginger towards the end of cooking, as prolonged heat can reduce its characteristic taste.
</section>

<section><header>Cooking Methods:</header> Stir-fry, simmer, marinate, infuse.</section>

Products.Name: Lime Fresh
Products.SupplyLimitMessage: 'Lime Fresh' has a supply limit of 36. The quantity in your cart has been reduced accordingly. To purchase a larger quantity, please contact us on 1800 000 610. Please note we do not supply trade orders.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Lime Fresh each: Your fresh, natural produce for the kitchen. Simple to prepare and enjoy in various dishes. Available at Woolworths online.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
<section>Fresh Limes offer a burst of zesty, tangy flavour with their bright green skins and juicy pulp. These versatile citrus fruits are perfect for adding a refreshing twist to a wide range of dishes and beverages.</section>

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Choose limes that are firm and feel heavy for their size, indicating plenty of juice. Look for smooth, bright green skins without discolouration or soft spots.
</section>

<section><header>How to Store:</header> Store fresh limes at room temperature for up to a week. For longer freshness, keep them in the crisper drawer of your refrigerator, where they can last for several weeks.</section>
